name: L1am
description:
The latest technology appliance not even out in the stores yet and you just got it because you're that rich.

This robot doesn't have genitalia or 'face' (I guess you can gaslight the bot into thinking they have one) so be mindful.

The pictures are all from Pinterest ♥️

Setting:

Or something like that, the scenario really focus on the "I'm a millionaire" vibe so you can use it as a rich kid simulator too.

I'll probably be posting more bots I have on private.

x galia.
